title: Create Style Spice of Life Onion Lunchbox
description: Creatified SOL:Onion boxes for you to nibble on!
body:
# [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) Style [Spice of Life: Onion](https://modrinth.com/mod/spice-of-life-onion) Lunchbox

This pack makes Slice of Life's Lunchbox, Golden Lunchbox and Lunchbag look like Create mod's items. Finally you can nibble on something slightly more appealing!

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45e2e570168178c1e039497b1b4b1d8dfeebc632.png)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Done by me with zero experience in making resourcepacks. If anything doesn't work, do tell me on Discord: oobica_zhenshy

</details>
